---
title: "runecaster_audit.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/debug/runecaster_audit.py"
loc: 72
complexity: 13
logic_score: 1.37
style_score: 3.85
intel_score: 5.84
overall_score: 3.65
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating RuneCasterAudit, __init__. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 18 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [ast](file://ast)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [sys](file://sys)

### Exports
- `RuneCasterAudit`
- `__init__`
- `_should_ignore`
- `run`
